required_tools.reason: All projects use GitHub for source control, CI/CD, and PR workflows.
Infrastructure context and tasks involve Kubernetes/Helm operations, CRDs, and cluster management.
Multiple tasks require PostgreSQL: CloudNative-PG operator, database migrations, SQLx/pgx usage, RMS, Finance, Catalog, Vetting, Social, and GDPR orchestrator.
Valkey (Redis-compatible) is provisioned via operator and used for rate limiting, caching, and background tasks in Catalog, Finance, and other services.
NATS is used for async publish pipeline in Social Media Engine and for inter-service messaging (noted in infra endpoints and social engine tasks).
Cloudflare Tunnel and R2 are provisioned and referenced for ingress, storage, and CDN. R2 credentials are managed as secrets.
Signal-CLI sidecar is provisioned for Morgan AI Agent and Social Media Engine for Signal-based messaging and approval workflows.

recommended_tools.reason: Prometheus is referenced for metrics collection, ServiceMonitor CRs, and alerting in both infra and app tasks. Not strictly required for app logic, but highly recommended for observability.
Loki is referenced for log aggregation and audit logging in infra and app tasks. Not strictly required for app logic, but recommended for monitoring and compliance.
Grafana is referenced for dashboards and alerting. Not strictly required for app logic, but recommended for monitoring and operational visibility.
